summary: Phases 1-3 and 5 complete and committed: logind HandleLidSwitch/HandleLidSwitchExternalPower=ignore in modules/system/power.nix (Phase 1), GNOME sleep-inactive-ac-type=nothing in modules/home/desktop/gnome.nix (Phase 2), niri swayidle 10-min systemctl suspend removed from config/config.kdl (Phase 3, niri validate OK), and proportionate doc updates to docs/gnome-settings.md, docs/niri.md, docs/configuration.md (Phase 5; modules/README.md touch skipped with deviation annotation — no per-file power.nix characterization exists there). All build-level verification green: nix flake check, nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa after each config phase, logind.conf eval shows both ignore lines with KillUserProcesses=false retained. Phase 4 (activation + runtime verification) is BLOCKED pending the user: the agent cannot obtain interactive sudo.

artifacts.summary: logind.settings.Login lid-ignore block with explanatory banner comment
sleep-inactive-ac-type = nothing (AC idle-suspend disabled; battery 15-min suspend retained)
swayidle spawn without the 600s systemctl suspend pair; lock behavior preserved
Implementation summary with verification results and pending user activation steps

continuation_context: All config and doc edits are committed and build-verified; nothing further is automatable without sudo. USER ACTION REQUIRED: (1) sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa; (2) busctl get-property org.freedesktop.login1 /org/freedesktop/login1 org.freedesktop.login1.Manager HandleLidSwitch should return s "ignore" (if still "suspend", systemctl restart systemd-logind or reboot); (3) gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.power sleep-inactive-ac-type should return 'nothing' (may need logout/login); (4) lid test: close lid ~2 min with no external monitor, journalctl -b -u systemd-logind | grep -i lid shows 'Lid closed.' with no suspend; (5) regression: docked lid-close keeps windows on external display, 5-min idle blank still works. After these pass, mark Phase 4 complete and set task 117 to completed.
blockers: Phase 4 activation requires interactive sudo (sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa); the implementing agent's sudo access is denied by the permission system
next_steps: User runs sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa and performs the runtime checks in continuation_context, then task 117 can be marked completed
